'''kawaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:caaming|caaming]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caaming|caaming]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kawaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæwæjæth|kæwæjæth]] || [[word:kæwæjæj|kæwæjæj]] || [[word:kæwæjæsh|kæwæjæsh]] || [[word:kæwæjæ|kæwæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kawawajath|kawawajath]] || [[word:kawawajaj|kawawajaj]] || [[word:kawawajash|kawawajash]] || [[word:kawawaja|kawawaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kawajath|kawajath]] || [[word:kawajaj|kawajaj]] || [[word:kawajash|kawajash]] || [[word:kawaja|kawaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kawafjath|kawafjath]] || [[word:kawafjaj|kawafjaj]] || [[word:kawafjash|kawafjash]] || [[word:kawafjaf|kawafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kawajatha|kawajatha]] || [[word:kawajaja|kawajaja]] || [[word:kawajasha|kawajasha]] || [[word:kawajaka|kawajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kawajath|kawajath]] || [[word:kawajaj|kawajaj]] || [[word:kawajash|kawajash]] || [[word:kawaja|kawaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kawajathal|kawajathal]] || [[word:kawajajal|kawajajal]] || [[word:kawajashal|kawajashal]] || [[word:kawajakal|kawajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kawajathatha|kawajathatha]] || [[word:kawajajaja|kawajajaja]] || [[word:kawajashasha|kawajashasha]] || [[word:kawajaka|kawajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kawajathan|kawajathan]] || [[word:kawajajan|kawajajan]] || [[word:kawajashan|kawajashan]] || [[word:kawajakan|kawajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kawajathaoro|kawajathaoro]] || [[word:kawajajaoro|kawajajaoro]] || [[word:kawajashaoro|kawajashaoro]] || [[word:kawajakaoro|kawajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
